instruction: Pivot-style grid table with row/column hierarchy (GridTable / S2), not a flat row table.
instructions:
GridTable (AntV S2). Config: build fields + metadata from real column keys; dims->addedAs row|column with floatingType discrete; measures->addedAs row with floatingType continous (spelling as-is); nest report.reportData.properties with crosstab defaults; override data/fields/metadata/marksList on props.
Polish: first dim as row, remaining dims as column when 2+ dims; keep data as-is; wrap in div; do not use Ant Design Table or PivotViewComponent.
